analyses.root_cause: The PR title '[Feat][Ops] Add A5 compressor support' uses '[Feat]' as a prefix, which is not in the allowed list. The validator expects '[Feature]' (full word), not the abbreviated '[Feat]'. This is a PR title validation failure in the 'lint / validate-pr-title' job, not a build or test failure.
fix_suggestions: Change the PR title from '[Feat][Ops] Add A5 compressor support' to '[Feature][Ops] Add A5 compressor support' (replace Feat with Feature).
If '[Feat]' should be a supported shorthand, add it to the VALID_PREFIXES regex in .github/workflows/_pre_commit.yml.
